'''nawopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroatelectasis|fibroatelectasis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroatelectasis|fibroatelectasis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nawopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || næwepeth || næwepej || næwepesh || næwepe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || nawowopoth || nawowopoj || nawowoposh || nawowopo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || nawopoth || nawopoj || nawoposh || nawopo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || nawofpofth || nawofpofj || nawofpofsh || nawofpof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || nawopotho || nawopojo || nawoposho || nawopoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || nawopoth || nawopoj || nawoposh || nawopo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || nawopothol || nawopojol || nawoposhol || nawopokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || nawopoothotho || nawopoojojo || nawopooshosho || nawopooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || nawopothon || nawopojon || nawoposhon || nawopokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || nawopothooro || nawopojooro || nawoposhooro || nawopokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
